<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get communication preferences"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/parties/{partyId}/preferences"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a known party's communication channel preferences, opt-out status,
and stored contact details.

The platform uses these preferences when resolving recipients by `partyId`
and when performing smart routing (`channel: auto`).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
